config.ks_survival.animalTickInterval.to: How often animal hunger and thirst decrements, in ticks (20 ticks = 1 second).
config.ks_survival.stressThreshold.toolt: Hunger or thirst level below which an animal becomes stressed (0–100).
config.ks_survival.wellFedThreshold.tool: Hunger and thirst level above which an animal is considered well-fed (0–100).
Number of consecutive well-fed ticks required to reach 100% productivity.
config.ks_survival.crowdingLimit.tooltip: Maximum animals of the same type within the crowding radius before stress applies.
config.ks_survival.crowdingRadius.toolti: Block radius checked when calculating crowding stress.
config.ks_survival.sicknessThreshold.too: Consecutive stressed ticks before an animal becomes sick.
Ticks at maximum hunger and thirst before the overfeeding penalty applies.
config.ks_survival.tamenessWildThreshold: Tameness at or below which an animal is considered wild and flees players (0–100).
config.ks_survival.tamenessDomesticThres: Tameness above which an animal is considered fully domestic with uncapped productivity (0–100).
config.ks_survival.animals.tooltip: List of entity IDs affected by husbandry mechanics (e.g. minecraft:cow).
config.ks_survival.animalDiet.tooltip: Food tags each animal accepts in the food trough. Format: namespace:entity=tag1,tag2
config.ks_survival.animalWaterNeeds.tool: Water consumed per drink per entity type in mB. Format: namespace:entity=amount
config.ks_survival.animalBreedingSeasons: Seasons each animal can breed in. Domestic animals always breed. Format: namespace:entity=SPRING,SUMMER
config.ks_survival.bandageHealAmount.too: How much health (in half-hearts) the bandage restores when applied.
config.ks_survival.bandageUseDuration.to: How long it takes to apply a bandage in ticks (20 ticks = 1 second).
config.ks_survival.can1Thirst.tooltip: Thirst restored by drinking the small can.
config.ks_survival.can1Quench.tooltip: Quench saturation value of the small can.
config.ks_survival.can2Thirst.tooltip: Thirst restored by drinking the big can.
config.ks_survival.can2Quench.tooltip: Quench saturation value of the big can.
